title: Six Nations 2026: France v England finale worthy of greatest ever Six Nations
description: History, records, upsets, high-scoring classics - and a thrilling finale. The 2026 Six Nations is likely to go down as the best edition in the tournament's history.
content:
Debate over whether the 2026 Six Nations would go down as the greatest in the tournament's history started before the final weekend.
History, records, upsets, high-scoring classics - by round five, the tournament had already produced gold.

title: 'Starmer may send drones to the Gulf' and 'Panic hits the pumps'

title: Meet the table tennis experts who turned Timothee Chalamet into Marty Supreme
description: Timothee Chalamet spent years perfecting his ping pong skills for the role of Marty Mauser in Marty Supreme. But will it be enough to win him the Oscar?
content:
There's often a common thread among the Oscar nominees who go on to win - and it's about a lot more than learning the lines.
Rami Malek had singing and piano lessons and worked with a choreographer to transform himself into Freddie Mercury for Bohemi... [3261 chars]

title: Prostate cancer screening just as good as routine breast cancer checks, study says - so will change happen?
description: Prostate cancer kills more than 12,000 men a year in the UK, slightly more than the number of women who die from breast cancer.
content:
Prostate cancer screening is just as good as the routine checks women have for breast cancer, according to a new study.
Researchers say the findings show it no longer makes sense to reject prostate cancer screening on the one hand while endorsing scr... [2579 chars]

title: 'Gruesome' war bets fuel calls for Kalshi Polymarket crackdown
description: Predictions markets have hosted millions of dollars of bets related to the war in Iran.
content:
Stew, a 35-year-old from Montana, has enjoyed dabbling in sports bets since he downloaded the Kalshi app about 18 months ago.
